content.en:
"The Eternal Flint is not in the Boulder Lair right now!"

Bloodstone said.

“......"

One by one, these Supreme Ninefold Ancestors showed expressions of disbelief.

"Bloodstone, do you want to die?" said the Day Tiger Dao Ancestor coldly.

Bloodstone smiled bitterly: "Everyone, the eternal flint is really not in the ancient nest of the boulder. If it was in the Great Stone Lair, how could Stygian Cloud be deceived by the Eternal Flint powder here!

When they think about it, it seems so!

Stygian clouds such a supreme enhancement level sneaked here wearing the clothes of nothingness, and the transformation level of the boulder tribe could not be discovered at all.

Therefore, if the Eternal Flint was in the Ancient Nest of the Stone, the Stygian Cloud must have been found long ago.

At this time, Dongchen Daozu asked, "Where is the Eternal Flint Stone?"

Bloodstone sighed, still not hiding it.

He knew that if he casually made up a reason, these Supreme Ninefold Ancestors would not believe it, and maybe they would still destroy the Boulder Tribe.

Therefore, he can only say the whereabouts of the Eternal Flint in this way.

"In the Cutting Off Zone!"

Bloodstone said.

"Cut off the !! of the restricted area"

These Supreme Ninefold Ancestors were shocked, how could the Eternal Flint be in the Forbidden Zone?

"In the Cut-off Zone, you dare to enter the Cut-off Zone?" Dongchen Daozu was skeptical.

The other Supreme Ninefold Ancestors were also a little unconvinced.

They were very aware of the danger of cutting off the forbidden area, and if they entered, they would almost certainly die, but if they entered, they would not be afraid of the danger.

But their strength is too strong, and once they enter the cut-off zone, they will encounter even more terrifying dangers.

Therefore, they did not dare to enter the depths of the Interception Forbidden Zone, and even if they did, they had to exit quickly.

"It's really cutting off the forbidden area!" Bloodstone explained, "Our Boulder Tribe hasn't given birth to a clansman at the peak of the transformation level, and even if it is me, I am still a little short of impacting to the enhancement level, so I can't use the Eternal Flint to break through for the time being." But the Eternal Flint is very mysterious, even if it is at the level of the Enhancement Substance, it does not necessarily mean that there is much knowledge about the Eternal Flint. And our Megalith Tribe has been getting the Eternal Flint for a long time, but it has not been known to the outside world before. And after such a long period of research, we finally have the results. The result is to use the power of the Eternal Flint to enter the flame area that cuts off the forbidden area, and it will not cause those terrifying things!"

"Eternal flint can also help access areas of fire that cut off the exclusion zone?"

These Supreme Ninefold Ancestors were shocked.

Although they knew about the Eternal Flint Stone, and some of them used the Eternal Flint Stone to break through to the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, they also didn't know the use of the Eternal Flint Stone.

After all, if they obtain the Eternal Flint Stone, it will definitely be used to help break through the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, who will use it to study other uses, and it is impossible to let the Eternal Flint enter the Truncated Forbidden Zone, if it is lost in the Truncated Forbidden Zone and cannot be recovered, it will be a big loss!

"One of your avatars from the Bloodstone Tribe took the Eternal Flint to the Forbidden Zone?"

Dongchen Daozu asked.

Bloodstone nodded: "Yes, our primordial antiquities have reached the transformation level, and it is very difficult for them to grow, even more difficult than you cultivators. If you want to reach the limit of the Transformation Level, it is very difficult to have the qualification to Impact to the Enhancement Level. Therefore, Shadow Stone, the strongest of our Boulder tribe, went to the Forbidden Zone with the Eternal Flint Stone, hoping to use the resources in the Forbidden Zone Flame Area to impact to the extreme of the Void Level. When the time comes, he will be able to use the Eternal Flint to impact to the enhancement level. Once our Boulder Tribe has given birth to a supreme strengthener, then we don't need to fear the Hades Tribe anymore!"

"I see!"

Many of the enhancement levels are thoroughly understood.

But they were surprised that Bloodstone had really revealed this secret, shouldn't they keep this secret to the death?

After all, this is the only chance for the rise of the Boulder Tribe!

"You actually directly revealed the situation of your Giant Stone Tribe's Shadow Stone, which is a bit beyond my expectations!" said the Day Tiger Dao Ancestor.

Bloodstone didn't speak, the reason why he said it was because of their threat, he didn't want to fall, and second, his relationship with Shadowstone was not good.

Moreover, the Eternal Flint was obtained and found by the Shadow Stone, and it is also the Shadow Stone, which has nothing to do with him, he also wants to get the Eternal Flint Stone!

But Shadow Stone's strength is even stronger than him, so he can't beat it.

One more thing, that is, it doesn't matter, after all, if the Shadow Stone does not break through to the Enhancement Level, it will never return to the Boulder Tribe, which is also the original agreement, to prevent the Eternal Flint from being exposed and snatched away after the Shadow Stone returns.

Shadowstone will either make it back or fall to the outside world entirely.

Moreover, Shadow Stone is cutting off the forbidden area, and he can't contact him.

So, it makes no difference between saying it and not saying it.

"Bloodstone, let the shadow stone of your megalith tribe come back!"

The Day Tiger Dao Ancestor ordered.

"Daytiger Daozu, I can't get in touch, he's cutting off the forbidden area, I only know that in the flame area, nothing else can be done. Bloodstone said helplessly.

"So, where did you find the Eternal Flint of your Monolithic Tribe?"

Dongchen Daozu asked.

Bloodstone explained, "The Eternal Flint was found by Shadowstone, and I don't know where he found it, and even if he did, it wouldn't be there, otherwise I would have gone a long time ago!"

As soon as these Supreme Ninefold Ancestors heard it, what Bloodstone said made sense.

But now, they naturally don't have any gain!

"Cut off the exclusion zone!"

They sighed slightly, it was still too dangerous there! they couldn't put their lives on the line for the eternal flint, it was not worth it!

The Eternal Flint is of no use to them, so it is impossible for them to cut off the forbidden area and venture out.

Subsequently, these Supreme Ninefold Ancestors left here and did not destroy the Monolithic Tribe.

After all, once the Shadow Stone really breaks through to the Enhanced Substance Level in the future, then destroying the Boulder Tribe will cause the Shadow Stone to retaliate frantically.

Even if the shadow stone is besieged from behind, the loss is inevitable.

This is not a time of war, and there is no need to bring unknown dangers to yourself.

So, they didn't attack the Monolithic tribe.

"Finally gone!"

Bloodstone breathed a sigh of relief.

He was really afraid that these Supreme Ninefold Ancestors would repent, so he would destroy them.

"To the fortification level, when can I reach it, if I can reach this realm, I won't be so aggrieved today!"

Bloodstone Secret Passage.

Soon after, the Supreme Nine Primordial Ancestors of the major forces told the Nine Primordial Ancestors of the Shadow Stone and the Eternal Flint to the Nine Primordial Ancestors among the forces.

As for whether these Ninefold Primordial Ancestors have a way, it's up to them.
